messages.content:
is this subject correct

Urgent: Replacement of Call Center Manager - Upgrade of Ms. Cevhere Fide
As an AI language model, I cannot determine the context or the relevance of the subject. Please provide more information or clarity for me to assist you better.

correct the email

Dear Mrs. Kholoud,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to urgently request your attention to proceed with the upgrade of Ms. Cevhere Fide (ID# 6684) to the position of Call Center Manager, in light of the recent resignation of Ms. Amani S. Attiah (ID# 2922), who has accepted a job offer outside the IMC with a salary increase of 36% over her current offer with us.

To minimize any potential impact and ensure continuity of our operations, Ms. Fide as second in command will gradually begin taking over Ms. Attiah’s responsibilities with immediate effect.

Dr. Hossam has been informed of the decision and has expressed his understanding and support. We appreciate your continued support and cooperation in this matter.


Best regards,
[Your Name]

correct email

Dear Mrs. Kholoud,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to urgently request your attention to proceed with the upgrade of Ms. Cevhere Fide (ID# 6684) to the position of Call Center Manager, in light of the recent resignation of Ms. Amani S. Attiah (ID# 2922), who has accepted a job offer outside the IMC with a salary increase of 36% over her current offer with us.

To minimize any potential impact and ensure continuity of our operations, Ms. Fide as second in command will gradually begin taking over Ms. Attiah’s responsibilities with immediate effect 15/06/2023.

Dr. Hossam has been informed of the decision and has expressed his understanding and support. We appreciate your continued support and cooperation in this matter.


Best regards,
[Your Name]

اكتب ذلك بالإنجليزي

كما وعدتك أخي الحبيب بالعمل الفوري على الترويج لخدمات المستشفى الالكترونية بالتنسيق مع التسويق فإليك نقاط العمل أدناه .. سوف تجد كذلك في المرفق وسوف أرسله لك ايضا على الواتس الفيديو الترويحي الذي تصميمه مع فريق التسويق لهذه الحملة الترويجية المستهدفة حتى يكون جميع مرضى المسشتفى على علم بالخدمات الالكترونية للمستشفى

As I promised you, my dear brother, I will immediately work on promoting the services of the e-hospital in coordination with the marketing team. Below are the action points that we will work on. You will also find attached the promotional video designed by the marketing team for this targeted promotional campaign, which I will send to you on WhatsApp so that all hospital patients are aware of the e-hospital services.

كتب ذلك بالإنجليزي كما وعدتك أخي الحبيب بأننا سنقوم بالعمل الفوري على الترويج لخدمات المستشفى الالكترونية بالتنسيق مع التسويق فإليك نقاط العمل المتفق عليها مع التسويق في الإيميل أدناه .. سوف تجد كذلك في المرفق وسوف أرسله لك ايضا على الواتس الفيديو الترويحي الذي تصميمه مع فريق التسويق لهذه الحملة الترويجية المستهدفة حتى يكون جميع مرضى المسشتفى على علم بالخدمات الالكترونية للمستشفى

As I promised you, my dearest brother, we will immediately work on promoting the e-hospital services in coordination with the marketing team. Please find below the action points agreed upon with marketing via email. You will also find attached the promotional video designed by the marketing team for this targeted promotional campaign, which I will also send to you on WhatsApp to ensure that all hospital patients are aware of the e-hospital services.

revised

As I promised you dear brother that we will work immediately to promote e-IMC services in coordination with the marketing team. Please see below agreed action points with email marketing below.

Attached you will also find the promotional video designed by the marketing team for this targeted promotional campaign, which I will also send to you on WhatsApp and through which we aim for all IMC patients to be aware of e-IMC services.
Looks good! The sentence is clear and concise.

اكتبه بالإنجليزي

سوف تجد مرفقًا أيضًا الفيديو الترويجي الذي صممه فريق التسويق لهذه الحملة الترويجية المستهدفة ، والذي سأرسله إليك أيضًا على WhatsApp والذي نهدف من خلاله أن يكون جميع مرضى IMC على دراية بخدمات e-IMC.

You will also find attached the promotional video designed by the marketing team for this targeted promotional campaign, which I will also send to you on WhatsApp, and through which we aim for all IMC patients to be aware of e-IMC services.
الإعلان عن خدمات IMC الإلكترونية

Announcement: IMC Electronic Services

We are delighted to announce the launch of our electronic services at IMC. At IMC, we always strive to provide our patients with the best services, and now, with our electronic services, we can serve you better.

Our electronic services include online consultations, medical records access, and appointment booking all in one place. You can easily access these services through our website or mobile app from the comfort of your own home.

We pride ourselves on our commitment to patient satisfaction and safety, and we believe that our electronic services will provide added convenience, accessibility, and flexibility for our patients.

Thank you for choosing IMC as your healthcare provider. We look forward to serving you with our new electronic services.

اكتبه بالإنجليزي

الإعلان عن خدمات IMC الإلكترونية

Announcement: IMC Electronic Services

We are pleased to announce the launch of our electronic services at IMC. At IMC, we always strive to provide our patients with the best services, and now, with our electronic services, we can serve you even better.

Our electronic services include online consultations, medical records access, and appointment booking-- all in one place. You can easily access these services through our website or mobile app from the comfort of your own home.

At IMC, we take pride in our commitment to patient satisfaction and safety. We believe that our electronic services will offer added convenience, accessibility, and flexibility for our patients.

Thank you for choosing IMC as your healthcare provider. We look forward to serving you with our new electronic services.

اكتب هذه الجملة بالإنجليزي

عزيزتي أماني إستكمالا لمحادثتنا الهاتفية أشكر لك إضافة الرقم الموحد 920027778 للفيديو الترويجي لخدمات المستشفى الالكترونية
Dear Amani, following our phone conversation, I would like to thank you for adding the toll-free number 920027778 to the promotional video for e-hospital services.

اكتب هذه الجملة بالإنجليزي

عزيزتي أماني إستكمالا لمحادثتنا الهاتفية سأكون شاكرة لك إضافة كذلك الرقم الموحد 920027778 للفيديو الترويجي لخدمات المستشفى الالكترونية
Dear Amani, following our phone conversation, I would be grateful if you could add the toll-free number 920027778 to the promotional video for e-hospital services.

correct

Dear Ms. Amani, following our phone conversation, I would be grateful if you could add as well the IMC unified number 920027778 to the promotional video for e-IMC services.
Dear Ms. Amani, following our phone conversation, I would be grateful if you could also add the IMC unified number 920027778 to the promotional video for e-IMC services.

correct

The marketing team was asked to add the unified number of the hospital in the promotional marketing video for the hospital's electronic services
The marketing team was requested to include the hospital's unified number in the promotional marketing video for the hospital's electronic services.

reply on this

Dear Eng. Osama and all the heroes of IMC Network Contact Center,

Thank you very much for all the outstanding efforts that led to this impressive award.

Please keep it up and always wish you the best of luck!

Great job, Eng. Osama and the incredible team at IMC Network Contact Center! Congratulations on winning such an impressive award!

Your hard work, dedication, and commitment to excellence have truly paid off and have been recognized. I appreciate all of your outstanding efforts in ensuring that our patients receive the best possible care and attention.

Once again, congratulations on this well-deserved award, and I wish you all continued success in your future endeavors.

I am Eng. Osama and i need a reply on this email below

Dear Eng. Osama and all the heroes of IMC Network Contact Center,

Thank you very much for all the outstanding efforts that led to this impressive award.

Please keep it up and always wish you the best of luck!

Dear [Name],

Thank you for your kind words of appreciation. It is incredibly rewarding to hear that our hard work and dedication have led to this impressive award. It truly strengthens our commitment to providing excellent service to our patients.

Rest assured that we will continue to strive for excellence and keep on improving to provide the best possible experience for all our patients. 

Thank you once again for the recognition and support. We will always strive to deliver the highest level of service to our patients.

Kind regards,

Eng. Osama and the team at IMC Network Contact Center
please summarized more

Sure, here's a more concise and summarized reply to the email:

Dear [Name],

Thank you for your appreciation and recognition of our efforts in winning the award. We will continue to work hard and strive for excellence in providing exceptional service to our patients.

Thank you for your support, and we look forward to continuing our commitment to delivering high-quality care to our patients.

Best regards,

Eng. Osama and the IMC Network Contact Center team
make it shorter

Here's a shorter version of the reply:

Dear [Name],

Thank you for appreciating our efforts. We will continue to provide excellent service to our patients.

Best regards,

Eng. Osama and the IMC Network Contact Center team

correct

Thank you Dear Dr. Anees for appreciating our efforts. We will continue to provide excellent service to our patients.
The sentence is grammatically correct and conveys the intended meaning.

نقح وترجم للإنجليزية

شكرا أخي العزيز دكتور حسام لدعمك المعتاد .. أختي العزيزة خلود أحيطكم علمآ بأن كافة تقييمات الموظفة منذ 2018 وحتى 2023 يتم عملها أولآ بأول ومتوافرة لدى الموارد البشرية

Thank you, my dear brother Dr. Hossam, for your usual support. My dear sister Khuloud, I would like to inform you that all employee evaluations from 2018 to 2023 are being processed in real-time and are available with the human resources department.

نقح وترجم للإنجليزية

شكرا أخي العزيز دكتور حسام لدعمك المعتاد

أختي العزيزة خلود أحيطكم علمآ بأن كافة تقييمات الموظفة منذ 2018 وحتى 2023 معمولة بشكل سنوي للموظفة ومتوافرة لدى الموارد البشرية .. برجاء إحاطتي في حال إحتجتي لأي أمر آخر

Thank you, my dear brother Dr. Hossam, for your usual support.

My dear sister Khuloud, I would like to inform you that the employee evaluations are carried out annually for each year starting from 2018 until 2023, and that they are available with the human resources department. Please let me know if there is anything else you require.

نقح وترجم للإنجليزية

أختي العزيزة خلود أحيطكم علمآ بأن كافة تقييمات الموظفة منذ 2018 وحتى 2023 معمولة بشكل سنوي للموظفة ومتوافرة لدى الموارد البشرية … برجاء إحاطتي في حال إحتجتي لأي أمر آخر

My dear sister Khuloud, I would like to inform you that all employee evaluations from 2018 to 2023 are conducted annually and are available with the human resources department. Please let me know if you require any further assistance.

شكرا أخي العزيز دكتور حسام لدعمك المعتاد

أختي العزيزة خلود أحيطكم علمآ بأن كافة تقييمات الموظفة منذ 2018 وحتى 2023 معمولة بشكل سنوي للموظفة ومتوافرة لدى الموارد البشرية … برجاء إحاطتي في حال إحتجتي لأي أمر آخر .. اجراءاتك الفورية بهذا الصدد ستكون محل تقدير كبير

Thank you, my dear brother Dr. Hossam, for your continued support.

My dear sister Khuloud, I would like to inform you that all employee evaluations from 2018 to 2023 are conducted annually and are available with the human resources department. Please let me know if you require any further assistance. Your prompt actions in this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Revised this

Thank you so much Dear Brother Dr. Hossam for your kind support as usual.

Dear Sister Mrs. Kholoud, I would like to inform you that the employee evaluations of Ms. Cevhere Fide (ID# 6684) are carried out annually for each year starting from 2018 until 2023, and that they are available with the human resources department. Please let me know if there is anything else you require. Your prompt actions in this matter would be greatly appreciated.
The revised version looks good and conveys the intended message clearly.
